api_http_requests_total.help: Total HTTP requests processed by the API, labelled with promhttp code/handler conventions.

api_http_request_duration_seconds.help: HTTP request duration histogram exposed with a bare base name (Prometheus metadata returns the base; queryable series are _bucket/_sum/_count).

queue_items_received_total.help: Items the queue worker received from upstream; status holds domain values like accepted/rejected, NOT HTTP status codes.

queue_processing_duration_seconds_bucket.help: Queue item processing duration bucket; no HTTP-shape labels.
